tools.name: list_gatling_enterprise_teams
tools.description: List all existing teams in Gatling Enterprise

tools.name: list_gatling_enterprise_packages
tools.description: List all packages deployed in Gatling Enterprise. Managed packages are stored on Gatling Enterprise, private packages are stored on the infrastructure of the user's organization.

tools.name: list_gatling_enterprise_tests
tools.description: List all tests (aka simulations) deployed in Gatling Enterprise

tools.name: list_gatling_enterprise_locations
tools.description: List all managed and private locations where tests can be run on Gatling Enterprise. Group managed location IDs by region, private location IDs by type.
